Patch Set 1:

> Can this be merged, please? It is approved already for "staging"
 > branch.

I am not sure now regarding merging to master. Should it be done for every patch or at some points during the release. Hopefully there were some clarifications on the process at PTL meeting and those can be shared with the community.

Patch Set 1:

> I am not sure now regarding merging to master. Should it be done for every patch or at some points during the release. Hopefully there were some clarifications on the process at PTL meeting and those can be shared with the community.

Oh, I understand. Thanks for explaining.
So staging is, currently, the mainline. Correct?
